# Seven Islands Resort — Watamu, Kenya

> Award-winning all-inclusive seafront resort on the Indian Ocean coast of Watamu, Kenya.
> Family-run for over 30 years. Luxury rooms, beachfront dining, spa, and safari tours.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/)
- [About the Resort](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/about.php)
- [Rooms & Suites](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/rooms.php)
- [Dining](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/dining.php)
- [SPA & Wellness](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/spa.php)
- [Safari & Excursion Tours](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/tours.php)
- [Travel Agency Partners](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/agency.php)
- [Contact](https://sevenislandswatamu.com/contact.php)

## Location & contact

- Phone: +254 0713 326 336
